mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately trigger negative equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that sustains corporate earnings growth, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative 60-day returns in >50% of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the index of industrial production during periods of high inflation indicate supply-side bottlenecks that compress profit margins and force negative equity repricing over one month.
failure_condition: Negative signal fails to predict returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds 210, with out-of-sample accuracy dropping below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate level above 4.0 percent establishes a restrictive monetary policy stance that rapidly suppresses risk appetite and generates negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and a simultaneously rising unemployment rate indicates labor market slack and productivity deterioration, forecasting negative quarterly equity performance.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive 60-day returns in >50% of instances or the interaction effect vanishes in panel regression analysis.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly translates to stronger corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows or GDPC1 growth shows no statistically significant correlation with 20-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial production during economic contractions signal immediate revenue shocks that trigger rapid negative equity repricing within one week.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day returns occur in less than 40% of triggered observations during contractionary periods.
